channel.title: JLT Spotlight (LinkedIn)
channel.description: Weekly Cruise, Hotel & Destination spotlights from JLT Group

item.title: In JLT, we track destination news when the access story changes in a way that opens up new bookings. The TUI direct flight to Zanzibar is one of those moments.
item.description:
In JLT, we track destination news when the access story changes in a way that opens up new bookings. The TUI direct flight to Zanzibar is one of those moments.
From 3 November 2027, TUI will operate the only nonstop UK service between London Gatwick and Zanzibar, twice weekly, through to 22 March 2028. Winter 2027 packages go on sale 2 July 2026.
Lead-in prices start from £1,615 per person (two adults sharing, all-inclusive, seven nights including direct flights and transfers). Eight hotels on the island, plus the option to build in a short safari connection to Nyerere or the Serengeti via TUI Musement.
For agents with clients comparing Indian Ocean options on value, Zanzibar now has the route to match the product. Note the 2 July on-sale date and build your shortlist before the window opens.

item.title: This week's Hotel Spotlight is Bodrum Loft, and it solves a specific client brief.
item.description:
This week's Hotel Spotlight is Bodrum Loft, and it solves a specific client brief.
The hotel is a cluster of white minimalist villas stepping down a pine-forested hillside to a private cove in Demirbükü Bay, about 40 minutes from Bodrum airport. Nearly every room has a sea view, and the mood is calm rather than loud… closer to a private beach club than a party resort.
For agents, that is the value. It matches the client who wants Bodrum's design and service without the crowds, with a strong table in Paper Moon and villa kitchens that suit families and longer stays.
Hold it for the next client who asks for luxury without the scene.

item.title: This week's Spotlight is Silversea, and the timing is the story.
item.description:
This week's Spotlight is Silversea, and the timing is the story.
The line is offering up to 45 per cent off select voyages across all seven continents, with suites to be reserved by 30 June 2026. That two-week window is what makes this worth acting on now, not the headline number.
For agents working in the luxury tier, Silversea's all-suite, all-inclusive model covers far more than the cabin, and reduced deposits from 15 per cent make securing a suite an easier message for clients with a voyage in mind.
Three autumn 2026 sailings worth flagging: Silver Ray (Balearics, from £3,550 pp), Silver Nova and Silver Spirit (both Greek Isles and Istanbul, from £3,750 and £3,850 pp). Two overlapping Greek Isles departures give agents useful comparison material when a client is weighing schedule over ship.
Pull your luxury cruise list before 30 June.

item.title: Hotel of the Week (example)
item.description:
[EXAMPLE — JLT Spotlight test item. Safe to delete once the Sociamonials source is saved.]
Hotel of the Week.
This is a placeholder so Sociamonials can validate and save the JLT Spotlight (LinkedIn Business) source. Real hotel spotlights replace this each Wednesday, positioning JLT as a switched-on host agency. The blog link is added in the comments 24-48h after posting.

[EXAMPLE — JLT Spotlight test item. Safe to delete once the Sociamonials source is saved.]
Cruise of the Week.
Second placeholder item for source validation. Real cruise spotlights replace this. The blog link is added in the comments 24-48h after posting.
